title: chamaemelum lamellatum
intro: Chamaemelum nobile, commonly known as the chamomile daisy or English chamomile, is a low-growing perennial plant in the daisy family with white petals and yellow centers. It is often used as a calming agent and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Chamaemelum nobile include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and soothing skin irritations. Chamaemelum nobile can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream for its herbal benefits, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
